whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to recall the word bed from the previous repetition of words question. 2 = Yes, no cue required 
1 = Yes, after cueing ("a piece of furniture") 
0 = No - could not recall 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
467 BIMS_SCRE_DSCHRG_CD BIMS_SCRE_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Summary Score (Dsch) CHAR 2 This column is the patients BIMS summary score at the time of discharge. 00 = Minimum value 
15 = Maximum value 
99 = Patient was unable to complete
